_note: Batch: the 10 branches of the Shahar (עמותת שחר, mehina.net) half-year pre-military mechina network, researched at the user's request (specifically confirming 'Shahar David' = Mechinat Shahar David at Tel Katzir is included). Cross-checked against the existing ~383 entries first: none of these 10 branches or their host kibbutzim were already in the DB. Also researched per the user's request: Yeshivat Chispin and 'yeshivot of the same type' (Bnei Akiva / Merkaz YBA hesder network), and Yeshivat Itamar -- both came back as ALREADY PRESENT under different names (Yeshivat Chispin = existing 'Yeshivat HaGolan' program, slug yeshivat-hagolan, located in Chispin/Haspin, Golan Heights; Yeshivat Itamar = existing 'Yeshiva Gevoha Itamar' program, slug yeshiva-gevoha-itamar), so no rows for those two were added here. Further research into the Merkaz YBA hesder network turned up no additional missing yeshivot: the network's flagship hesder yeshivot (Kerem B'Yavneh, Hakotel, Maalot Yaakov, Birkat Moshe) are all already in the DB; a fourth (Yamit) was evacuated with the rest of the Yamit region in 1982 and no longer operates as a distinct current program. Contact phone below is the Shahar organization's shared office line (each branch's page also lists a director's personal WhatsApp cell, deliberately omitted here as not appropriate for a public listing). contactEmail is the network's shared office address, observed identically on every branch page -- included here per normal import-researched.ts handling (captured to the ignored-emails audit file for the contact-verification queue, never written directly to Program.contactEmail).

mechina.name: Mechinat Shahar Elrom
mechina.location: Kibbutz Elrom, northern Golan Heights, Israel
mechina.description: A coed pre-military mechina on Kibbutz Elrom in the northern Golan Heights, part of the Shahar network. The half-year program combines personal development, group living, and Zionist and social engagement, emphasizing inner resilience, connection to Israeli society, and preparation for meaningful IDF service.
mechina.durationText: Half year (~6 months, roughly August/September to February/March)
mechina.signupInstructions: Apply via the online registration form linked from the branch page.

mechina.name: Mechinat Shahar Degania
mechina.location: Kibbutz Degania, Sea of Galilee, Israel
mechina.description: A coed pre-military mechina on Kibbutz Degania by the Sea of Galilee, continuing the founding path of the Shahar network's original mechina. The half-year program builds responsibility, resilience, and teamwork through group living, community engagement, and preparation for meaningful IDF service.
mechina.durationText: Half year (~6 months, roughly August/September to February/March)
mechina.signupInstructions: Apply via the online registration form linked from the branch page.

mechina.name: Mechinat Shahar Malkia
mechina.location: Kibbutz Malkia, Upper Galilee (northern border), Israel
mechina.description: A coed pre-military mechina on Kibbutz Malkia along Israel's northern border, part of the Shahar network. The half-year program integrates participants into border-community life while building resilience, responsibility, and Zionist commitment in preparation for meaningful IDF service.
mechina.durationText: Half year (~6 months, roughly August/September to February/March)
mechina.signupInstructions: Apply via the online registration form linked from the branch page.

mechina.name: Mechinat Shahar David (Tel Katzir)
mechina.location: Kibbutz Tel Katzir, Sea of Galilee, Israel
mechina.description: A boys-only pre-military mechina on Kibbutz Tel Katzir overlooking the Sea of Galilee, part of the Shahar network. Named in memory of David Ohana, a first-cycle staff member, the half-year program emphasizes simplicity, honesty, and inner growth alongside group living, challenge, and preparation for meaningful IDF service.
mechina.durationText: Half year (~6 months, roughly August/September to February/March)
mechina.signupInstructions: Apply via the online registration form linked from the branch page.

mechina.name: Mechinat Shahar Tal
mechina.location: Kibbutz Beit Zera, Sea of Galilee, Israel
mechina.description: A coed pre-military mechina for religious and secular participants on Kibbutz Beit Zera, part of the Shahar network. Named in memory of Tal Ratzon, the half-year program centers on meaningful living, inner resilience, and social responsibility through group life, community service, and field study.
mechina.durationText: Half year (~6 months, roughly August/September to February/March)
mechina.signupInstructions: Apply via the online registration form linked from the branch page.

mechina.name: Mechinat Shahar Rotem
mechina.location: Mikveh Israel agricultural school, near Holon, Israel
mechina.description: The Shahar network's girls-only pre-military mechina, based at the Mikveh Israel agricultural school near Holon. Renamed in memory of Rotem Neiman, a program graduate killed at the Nova festival on October 7, 2023, the half-year program develops young women's personal capability, group responsibility, and preparation for meaningful IDF service.
mechina.durationText: Half year (~6 months, roughly August/September to February/March)
mechina.signupInstructions: Apply via the online registration form linked from the branch page.

mechina.name: Mechinat Shahar Haon
mechina.location: Kibbutz Haon, Sea of Galilee, Israel
mechina.description: A coed pre-military mechina on Kibbutz Haon along the Sea of Galilee, part of the Shahar network. The half-year program deliberately brings together participants from across the spectrum of Israeli society, building resilience, identity, and preparation for meaningful IDF service.
mechina.durationText: Half year (~6 months, roughly August/September to February/March)
mechina.signupInstructions: Apply via the online registration form linked from the branch page.

mechina.name: Mechinat Shahar Hukuk
mechina.location: Kibbutz Hukuk, Sea of Galilee, Israel
mechina.description: A coed pre-military mechina on Kibbutz Hukuk overlooking the Sea of Galilee, part of the Shahar network. The half-year program combines study, group living, fieldwork, and personal development in preparation for meaningful IDF service and community life.
mechina.durationText: Half year (~6 months, roughly August/September to February/March)
mechina.signupInstructions: Apply via the online registration form linked from the branch page.

mechina.name: Mechinat Shahar Mevo Dotan
mechina.description: A boys-only pre-military mechina in northern Samaria overlooking the Dotan Valley, part of the Shahar network since 2015. The half-year program focuses on mental resilience, responsibility, and leadership, and has guided hundreds of graduates into meaningful IDF service.
mechina.durationText: Half year (~6 months, roughly August/September to February/March)
mechina.signupInstructions: Apply via the online registration form linked from the branch page.

mechina.name: Mechinat Shahar Nitzan
mechina.location: Kibbutz Nitzan, southern coastal plain, Israel
mechina.description: A coed pre-military mechina on Kibbutz Nitzan on Israel's southern coastal plain, part of the Shahar network. Named in memory of graduate Tomer Barak, who fell in military service on October 7, the half-year program builds resilience and self-efficacy alongside connection to the state, Israeli society, and Jewish identity.
mechina.durationText: Half year (~6 months, roughly August/September to February/March)
mechina.signupInstructions: Apply via the online registration form linked from the branch page.
